Package org.c02e.jpgpj

Class DecryptionResult

java.lang.Object
org.c02e.jpgpj.DecryptionResult
public class DecryptionResult extends Object
Holds the most detailed information about a decrypted file

  • Method Details

    • getFileMetadata

      public FileMetadata getFileMetadata()
      Returns:
      The decrypted FileMetadata - may be null if none was provided

    • isAsciiArmored

      public boolean isAsciiArmored()
      Returns:
      true if the encrypted data was armored

    • getArmorHeaders

      public List<String> getArmorHeaders()
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable List of extracted armored headers - is valid only if armored. Note: might be empty if the encrypted data was armored but contained no headers.

    • toString

      public String toString()
